videos.title: How Lalluram Was Built|The Truth About Indian Media, Crime News Craze, Modiji POV & Politics Debate.
videos.description:
In this powerful conversation with Namit Jain, we dive deep into his journey from a business background to building a strong presence in the media industry. From the story behind the name Lalluram to the biggest challenges he faced, this episode uncovers the mindset, risks, and realities of running a media house in today’s fast-changing digital world.

We also discuss the controversial phrase “according to sources”  what it really means in journalism, whether it’s fair to use without full confirmation, and how media credibility is shaped in the age of leaks and breaking news. 

The episode further explores why crime news attracts so much attention in India and the growing debate of influencers vs traditional news channels who should audiences really trust?
Namit Jain also shares his views on work-life balance, personal struggles, competitor analysis, the future of media houses, and his perspective on leadership and Indian politics. From discussing Modi ji’s impact to questioning why there’s no qualifying exam for politics like IAS, this episode is filled with bold questions and honest opinions.

If you’re someone interested in media, journalism, content creation, or understanding how narratives are built in India this conversation will give you clarity, perspective, and powerful insights.

videos.title: 128 Handwriting Parameters That Can Predict Personality, Mindset & Future Health Risks.
videos.description:
What if your handwriting could reveal more about you than your words ever could?

In this powerful podcast episode, we sit down with Manish, a professional Graphologist, to uncover how handwriting reflects personality, mindset, emotional patterns, and even life phases. From understanding what graphology actually is, to live handwriting tests and real-time personality analysis, this conversation goes deep into the science and psychology behind the pen.

Is graphology a science or spirituality?
Can handwriting really expose red flags, confusion, confidence, or emotional instability?
And most importantly—can changing the way you write help change the way you think?

Throughout the episode, Manish shares his journey into graphology, the doubts he had in the beginning, and the moment he realized that handwriting analysis actually works when applied correctly. You’ll also witness live handwriting tests, including a detailed analysis of the host’s handwriting, revealing traits that often go unnoticed in everyday life.

We also talk about: • How handwriting helps people in real life
* Why good handwriting doesn’t always mean a good mindset
* Situations where handwriting contradicts a person’s personality
* Whether graphology can predict different areas of life
* How to identify red flags through handwriting
* What happens when people are forced to change their writing
* Advice for people going through unstable or confusing phases in life
* The future of graphology and where this field is heading
This episode isn’t just about handwriting—it’s about self-awareness, clarity, and personal growth. If you’ve ever felt stuck, confused, or curious about understanding yourself better, this conversation might give you a new perspective.

videos.title: Aastha Verma: Empowering Women with Business & Social Change | Navratri Series | Episode 3
videos.description:
In this episode of Raipur Podcast's Navratri Series, we welcome Aastha Verma (Aastha Amanat), a dynamic young entrepreneur from Lakhnadaun, Madhya Pradesh. CEO and Co-founder of Prasiddhi PR and Amanat Foundation, and founder of Women Web, Aastha is on a mission to empower women socially, financially, and professionally. Hosted by Prakhar Agrawal, she shares her journey from a small town to becoming a leader in public relations and social work.

Aastha talks about her passion for empowering rural women through her initiatives, her experiences with societal challenges, and her vision of creating job opportunities for over 1,000 women by 2030. From her humble beginnings as a copywriter to building an empire that supports women entrepreneurs, this episode is filled with inspiring insights for anyone looking to make a difference.

Host - Prakhar Agrawal
Guest - Aastha Amanat
Location - Soha Homes

Do follow us on Instagram - @raipur_podcast

videos.title: Sonal Parakh: From School Crush to Business Success | Navratri Series | Raipur Podcast | Episode 2
videos.description:
In this inspiring episode of Raipur Podcast's Navratri Series, we sit down with Sonal Parakh, co-founder of Bbag Stationery Heaven and founder of Creative Convert. Hosted by Prakhar Agrawal, Sonal takes us through her incredible journey from a studious head girl in school to becoming a successful entrepreneur, building one of Central India’s largest stationery brands with her husband and life partner.

Sonal shares her story of resilience, creativity, and overcoming personal challenges like depression and a miscarriage. She dives into the founding of Bbag, her creative content for planners and journals, and how she manages to balance her business ambitions with her personal life. With insights on entrepreneurship, love, and teamwork, this episode is packed with inspiration for anyone looking to pursue their dreams.

Host - Prakhar Agrawal
Guest - Sonal Parakh
Location - Soha Homes

videos.title: Brigadier Pradeep Yadu: The Untold Story of a Kargil War Hero | Raipur Podcast
videos.description:
In this powerful episode of The Raipur Podcast, we sit down with Brigadier Pradeep Yadu, a Kargil War hero who led India to victory during one of the most challenging moments in our nation's history. Brigadier Yadu shares his inspiring journey, recounting the bravery, strategy, and sacrifice that defined the Kargil War. Beyond his military achievements, he reflects on life after service and the values that continue to guide him. This episode is a tribute to not only his remarkable leadership but also the courage and dedication of every soldier who fought for India's freedom.

Tune in to hear the untold story of a true national hero, filled with lessons of patriotism, resilience, and honor. Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more incredible stories from Raipur Podcast!
